message: Node started: Perform a comparative analysis between Quantum Darwinism (QD) and Holographic Quantum Error Correction (HQEC). 1) Identify core principles: QD (environment-induced decoherence, redundancy of information in sub-systems, emergence of classicality) vs. HQEC (bulk-boundary correspondence, entanglement wedge reconstruction, code subspace protection). 2) Map intersections: Redundancy in QD (multiple observers accessing same info) vs. Redundancy in HQEC (local boundary operators reconstructing bulk info); Information locality vs. Error correction thresholds. 3) Identify gaps: Lack of a unified mathematical formalism linking the pointer states of QD to the logical operators of HQEC, and the absence of formal proofs connecting the rate of information proliferation in QD to the code distance in HQEC.
